Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

Text "CHOCOLATE CHIP COOKIES WITH THE KITCHENAID STAND MIXER" appears, becoming bold black. A window with foliage and hanging fruit basket are in the background. [6-8] A close-up shows a hand manipulating a lever on the red mixer head, revealing a silver band with partial text "SAN" and French safety instructions. [8-10] A person in a dark top tilts the mixer head back to access the attachment hub and inserts a white flat beater into the shaft above the stainless steel bowl.

recent_thinks: [10-12] The perspective shifts to a top-down view of a white marble countertop. A hand pours cubed butter from a glass bowl into the mixer's stainless steel bowl. Text reading "UNSALTED BUTTER 225 G" appears. Surrounding the mixer are glass bowls containing brown sugar, eggs, chocolate chips, flour, and other baking ingredients.

[12-14] The camera angle changes to a side view of the red mixer. A person holds a glass bowl of cubed butter over the stainless steel bowl. They use a black spatula to scrape the butter chunks into the mixer, which is fitted with a white flat beater attachment.

[14-16] The camera returns to a top-down view where the mixer bowl now contains butter cubes and light brown sugar. A person holds a glass bowl of white granulated sugar. Text reading "GRANULATED SUGAR 150 G" appears in the bottom left corner. Surrounding ingredient bowls, including eggs and chocolate chips, remain on the white marble countertop to the right.

[16-18] A side view shows hands pouring white granulated sugar from a clear glass bowl into the stainless steel mixer bowl. The perspective shifts to a top-down angle as the person lowers the red mixer head down towards the ingredients, preparing to begin the mixing process.

samples.output: <think>A hand adjusts the silver speed lever on the side of the red mixer head. The camera shifts to a top-down view showing the mixer bowl with butter and sugar inside. compressed_segments.text: [0-2] Golden-brown thin cookies with embedded light chips fill the frame on a white surface, overlaid with centered white text "KitchenAid presents." [2-6] The scene shifts to a counter with three red stand mixers, silver bowls, and three corresponding cookie piles on white plates. Text "CHOCOLATE CHIP COOKIES WITH THE KITCHENAID STAND MIXER" appears, becoming bold black. A window with foliage and hanging fruit basket are in the background. [6-8] A close-up shows a hand manipulating a lever on the red mixer head, revealing a silver band with partial text "SAN" and French safety instructions. [8-10] A person in a dark top tilts the mixer head back to access the attachment hub and inserts a white flat beater into the shaft above the stainless steel bowl.

[14-16] The camera adopts a top-down perspective showing the stainless steel mixer bowl filled with butter cubes and light brown sugar. A person holds a clear glass bowl containing white granulated sugar over the white marble countertop, where bowls of eggs and chocolate chips are arranged to the right. On-screen text reads "GRANULATED SUGAR 150 G". [16-18] Switching to a side view, hands pour the white granulated sugar from the glass bowl into the mixer bowl. The perspective returns to top-down as the person lowers the red mixer head down towards the ingredients. [18-20] A hand adjusts the silver speed lever on the side of the red mixer. The camera shows a top-down view of the bowl as text "SET TO STIR MIX FOR 1 MINUTE" appears, with flour and other ingredients visible on the counter. [20-22] The red mixer begins blending the butter and sugar mixture. The scene cuts between the top-down mixing action and a close-up side view of the red mixer head operating with the silver branding band visible as the attachment mixes inside.

[24-28] From a top-down view, a red stand mixer blends ingredients in a stainless steel bowl while the text "MIX FOR 1-2 MORE MINUTES" displays. Surrounding glass bowls containing eggs, chocolate chips, and flour remain on the white marble countertop. [28-30] The on-screen text updates to "EGGS 2, LARGE" as a person's hands enter to grasp a small white bowl holding two cracked eggs with visible yellow yolks. [30-32] The person tilts the bowl to pour the raw eggs into the mixer, which contains a creamed butter and sugar mixture around a white flat beater attachment.

[32-36] Raw eggs pour from a white bowl into the stainless steel mixer around the white beater. A top-down view reveals the eggs on the creamed mixture. A hand reaches for and pours dark liquid from a small glass bowl as 'VANILLA 10 ML' displays. The hand adjusts the red mixer's speed lever; 'SET TO SPEED 4 MIX FOR 1 MINUTE' appears near bowls of chocolate chips and flour. [36-40] The red mixer blends the yellow batter. A close-up shows the white flat beater rotating. Text 'FLOUR 312 G' appears as a hand lifts a white bowl and pours flour into the mixer, falling onto the beater.

[40-44] From a top-down perspective, text "BAKING SODA 5 G" appears as a hand grasps a small glass bowl of white powder. A close-up shows the powder being poured into the stainless steel mixer bowl beside the dough-covered white flat beater attachment. The view returns overhead as text changes to "SEA SALT 6 G", and a hand reaches for another small glass bowl of white powder sitting next to a bowl of dark chocolate chips on the white marble surface. [44-48] The hand pours the salt into the mixer bowl. The red mixer operates, blending the flour and dough mixture while text "SET TO STIR MIX UNTIL COMBINED" appears at the bottom left. The scene cuts to a close-up side angle where hands stabilize the mixer head as the white beater lifts a thick clump of combined dough.

[12-14] The camera angle changes to a side view of the red mixer. A person holds a glass bowl of cubed butter over the stainless steel bowl. They use a black spatula to scrape the butter chunks into the mixer, which is fitted with a white flat beater attachment.

[50-52] Hands pour semi-sweet chocolate chips from a white bowl into the stainless steel mixer bowl. The view shifts to a top-down perspective as the red mixer operates. Text "SET TO STIR MIX UNTIL COMBINED" appears while the machine blends the dough and chips together.
